block_manager_features.current_posture: KvCachePageLayout and KvCacheState remain the canonical visible geometry surface
KvCacheOwnershipAccounting keeps before/after growth and scheduler binding explicit
owner-bound page eviction and reclaim are explicit instead of hidden inside opaque cache heuristics
host and device residency tiers plus refusal reasons are serialized directly in runtime evidence

stability_posture: Psionic already exposes a real paged-KV manager with visible page geometry, ownership accounting, spill policy, residency movement, and refusal posture. This packet closes the block-manager reporting seam without replacing that explicit evidence model with hidden heuristics.
